scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=@event-saas/client-master" "npm run dev --workspace=@event-saas/client-admin" "npm run dev --workspace=@event-saas/client-user"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=@event-saas/client-master && npm run build --workspace=@event-saas/client-admin && npm run build --workspace=@event-saas/client-user
scripts.setup: npm install -g pm2 serve && npm install
